title: Lockheed Martin (LMT)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Lockheed Martin using FY actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what LMT is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-w2vtsnjy>
Averaged from historical FCF. Growth represents historical trends rather than arbitrary constants. We bound it at 3% floor to reflect stable defense base.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-w2vtsnjy>
10Y Treasury: 4.18%. Beta: 0.20. Derived Equity Risk Premium: 4.0% (Earnings Yield of 3.3% - Risk Free Rate).

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-w2vtsnjy>
Calculated as exactly half of the current 10-Year Treasury Yield (4.18%).

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use DCF instead of a P/E multiple?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "Lockheed Martin (LMT) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026.
